personalize.solution.hporesourceconfig.C: Describes the resource configuration for hyperparameter optimization (HPO).

personalize.solution.hporesourceconfig.M.Description: The maximum number of training jobs when you create a solution version. The maximum value for `maxNumberOfTrainingJobs` is `40`.
The maximum number of parallel training jobs when you create a solution version. The maximum value for `maxParallelTrainingJobs` is `10`.
